responce.cover_letter_text:
Dear Hiring Team,

I’m writing to express my strong interest in the Software Engineer role at A.P. Moller – Maersk, particularly focused on the modernization of your Warehouse Management System. My background in building modern web applications with React.js and Next.js, combined with my experience in designing workflow-driven UIs, aligns perfectly with the requirements outlined in the job description. Notably, my work on the FRIDAY project, an AI-powered search engine, and the ATF framework demonstrated my ability to translate complex requirements into efficient, user-focused solutions – a skillset I believe is crucial for this role.

During my experience at Power Grid Corporation of India, I was involved in developing the FRIDAY UI, a significant project utilizing Next.js, React, and TypeScript to manage a large volume of company documents. This experience, alongside my previous work on TOKUMEI and AMS, has given me a solid understanding of building configuration-driven UIs and integrating with backend services, which directly relates to your need for a Self-Service Portal. My experience automating data collection and analysis as a Data Engineer at Crystal Works, increasing efficiency by 70% and 80% respectively, also showcases my ability to contribute to optimized workflows.

I’m particularly excited about the opportunity to contribute to the design and implementation of the Self-Service Portal and believe my skills in state management, REST API integration, and UI development using Material UI/AntD would be a valuable asset to your team. I’m eager to learn more about Maersk’s commitment to innovation and contribute to your efforts in creating a scalable and efficient warehouse execution system. 

Sincerely, Yashvardhan Ashok
responce.email_body:
Hi there,

I’m really interested in the Software Engineer role at A.P. Moller – Maersk, particularly the work on the Self-Service Portal. My experience building modern web applications with React.js and Next.js, as you can see in my attached resume, seems like a great fit. 

I’ve been focusing on workflow-driven applications, and I’m excited about the opportunity to contribute to Maersk’s modernization efforts. 

Thanks so much for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

Yashvardhan Ashok 

---

**Note:** This email focuses on the most relevant skills and experiences from your resume, aligning with the job description's emphasis on Next.js, React, and configuration UIs. It’s concise and avoids overly formal language.

responce.cover_letter_text:
Dear Hiring Team,

I was thrilled to see the Staff Engineer opening at ACV Auctions and am excited by the opportunity to contribute to a company revolutionizing the automotive industry. ACV’s focus on innovation, customer-centricity, and a collaborative environment deeply aligns with my own values and career aspirations. I’ve been particularly impressed by ACV’s dedication to building the most trusted digital marketplace for used vehicles, and I believe my experience in developing scalable and efficient applications would be a valuable asset to your team.

My background includes extensive experience in designing and building robust software solutions, as evidenced by projects like FRIDAY, TOKUMEI, and ATF. Specifically, my work automating tender data collection and analysis at Crystal Works, utilizing Python and SQL to increase data extraction and analysis efficiency by 70% and 80% respectively, directly mirrors the requirements outlined in the job description. Furthermore, my involvement in developing the AI-powered search engine (FRIDAY) with Gemma 2, LLaMA, and Phi-4, alongside building the TOKUMEI offline communication system, demonstrates my ability to tackle complex technical challenges and deliver impactful solutions.

I’m eager to leverage my expertise in React, Node.js, and AWS services – including Lambdas, S3, and EKS – to contribute to ACV’s continued growth and success. My commitment to continuous improvement, coupled with my passion for innovation and collaboration, makes me confident in my ability to thrive in ACV’s dynamic environment. 

Sincerely, Yashvardhan Ashok
responce.email_body:
Hi,

I was really excited to learn about the Staff Engineer role at ACV Auctions! The opportunity to contribute to a company revolutionizing the automotive industry with such a focus on innovation and customer success is incredibly appealing. 

I’ve been following ACV’s growth and I’m particularly impressed with your commitment to building a data-driven marketplace. My resume is attached for your review, showcasing my experience with React, Python, and building scalable applications – including projects like FRIDAY and TOKUMEI. 

I’m confident my skills and passion for technology align well with ACV’s values. 

Thanks for your time and consideration.

Best regards,

Yashvardhan Ashok

Dear Hiring Team,

I’m excited to express my interest in the Full-Stack Developer position at AsynzX Computing. My background in building scalable applications with Python, React JS, and AI-driven solutions aligns perfectly with your team’s focus on innovative products powered by AI and cloud technologies. 

Throughout my experience, I’ve consistently focused on creating robust and user-friendly solutions. Notably, my work on FRIDAY, an AI-powered search engine utilizing LLMs like Gemma 2, and TOKUMEI, an offline communication system, demonstrates my hands-on experience with AI/ML integration and backend development using Python and databases like PostgreSQL. I’ve also gained valuable experience automating data extraction with ATF, a web data extraction framework, and streamlining tender data collection with Crystal Works, increasing data extraction efficiency by 70% and analysis by 80%. 

I’m particularly drawn to AsynzX’s commitment to continuous learning and collaborative projects. My experience developing the Railway Management System, which automated city selection and email notifications, and my involvement with AI-based coding tools, directly address the requirements outlined in the job description. I’m confident my skills and passion for building impactful applications would be a valuable asset to your team.

Sincerely, Yashvardhan Ashok

I’m confident my background aligns well with the requirements for this position.

Yashvardhan Ashok

Dear Hiring Team,

I’m writing to express my strong interest in the Embedded Software Engineer positions at Atlanta Systems Pvt. Ltd. I’ve been consistently impressed by Atlanta Systems’ work in developing innovative smart device technology, and I’m excited by the opportunity to contribute to your expanding R&D team in Delhi. 

My background in embedded systems development, gained through projects like TOKUMEI – an offline communication system – and ATF, a web data extraction framework, has equipped me with a solid understanding of C/C++ development and real-time systems. I’m particularly experienced working with microcontrollers including ESP32 and have hands-on familiarity with IDEs such as KEIL and ESP IDF. My previous experience automating tender data collection for Crystal Works, increasing efficiency by 70%, combined with my work developing AI-powered search engines with Gemma 2, aligns well with the requirements of this role. 

I’m eager to apply my skills to Atlanta Systems’ projects, especially those leveraging BLE, Wi-Fi, and communication protocols like I2C and CAN. I’m confident my dedication to efficient, user-focused solutions would be a valuable asset to your team.

Sincerely, Yashvardhan Ashok
